title: SCP-058, Heart of Darkness
description: A heart filled with darkness. It's fast, deadly, and destructive...
body:
Heart of Darkness adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-058, also known as the Heart of Darkness.


SCP-058 is a fast and deadly hostile creature. It is capable of climbing walls and leaping forward with immense force, breaking blocks in its path. Its attacks inflict a Bleeding effect and heavy damage. When a player enters its 10-block radius, disturbing messages from SCP-058 appear. With its high damage output, unrelenting speed, and destructive abilities, SCP-058 is one of the most dangerous threats you can encounter. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-058 spawn?

SCP-058 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-058.

</details>



![SCP-058](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daf3f501e6e55b05a596d78830fa0fd68601f299.png)

SCP-058 is a highly aggressive creature that resembels a heart on 4 legs with 5 tentacles. It moves with high speed, has the ability to climb and leap towards victims like a spider. When attacking, it inflicts the Bleeding effect which will blooden the victims view and make it bleed. SCP-058 does not only target players, but will hunt animals and villagers as well. When aggressive, it smashes through blocks directly in front of it, jumping forward with enough force to tear apart its surroundings. Within a 10-block radius, SCP-058 emits ominous messages to players nearby, making it even more terrifying.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
